---
name: Security issue
about: Report a vulnerability — please email instead of opening publicly
title: "security: <do not include details>"
labels: security
---

## ⚠️ Please don't post vulnerability details here

If this is a security vulnerability, **close this template** and instead either:

1. Open a private security advisory at https://github.com/Shcherbin96/mcp-gateway/security/advisories/new
2. Or email the maintainer directly

Public disclosure of an unpatched issue puts all users at risk.

## If this is a hardening suggestion (not an exploit)

- What surface is affected?
- Why is the current behavior risky?
- What's a reasonable mitigation?
